name: Isagro S.p.A.
summary: Isagro S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, manufacturing, marketing, and distribution of agro pharmaceuticals products for crop protection and nutrition in Europe, Asia, North America, and South America. Its products include fungicides, insecticides, microorganisms, biostimulants, pheromones, and fumigants. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy. Isagro S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Holdisa S.r.l.
